headline: Piper Sandler Assumes GoDaddy at Neutral, Announces Price Target of $93
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst James Callahan   assumes GoDaddy (NYSE:GDDY) with a Neutral rating and announces Price Target of $93.

headline: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Arista Networks, Crocs, General Mills, GoDaddy, Jabil, Lumentum, MercadoLibre, Shopify, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower this morning, as issues in the Strait of Hormuz get murkier. Depending on how the oil situation is going, that is dictating market direction, and on Wednesday, there was no late-day rally to save the stock market, as the black gold was up 5%. All of the major ... Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Arista Networks, Crocs, General Mills, GoDaddy, Jabil, Lumentum, MercadoLibre, Shopify, and More
